title: Lemon Herb Pasta
description: A simple yet flavorful pasta dish with a bright and citrusy lemon herb sauce. This recipe is perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
While the pasta cooks, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the fresh parsley and dill to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until wilted.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for 1-2 minutes until heated through.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet with the lemon herb sauce.
Toss the pasta to combine and season with salt and pepper to taste.
